description: This chart displays data for only one region (Central) out of four, showing just a single group of bars while the title implies a complete comparison across all regions and customer segments. A reader would incorrectly assume the patterns visible here — Consumer orders dominating, with Corporate and Home Office far behind — represent a universal trend, when in fact the other three regions show substantially different relative patterns. The insufficient data creates a misleadingly confident impression of how segments compare across the entire dataset.
